Hero.title: Building Reliable Technology, Together.
Hero.subtitle: We partner with enterprises and institutions to design and deliver software, AI, blockchain, and cloud solutions that are built to last.

Capabilities.heading: Four Capabilities. One Standard.
Capabilities.subheading: We partner with enterprises and global institutions to deliver reliable technology across the full stack. Every engagement is held to a single standard — built to perform, built to last.
Capabilities.software_desc: We build custom software tailored to the way your organization works — thoughtfully designed, thoroughly tested, and built to scale with your business. Our teams work alongside yours as long-term partners, not short-term vendors.
Capabilities.ai_desc: We design and deploy AI systems that give your organization a clear, measurable advantage — from intelligent data pipelines to models your teams can act on with confidence. Our work is grounded in sound engineering, not trend-chasing.
Capabilities.blockchain_desc: We build transparent, auditable ledger infrastructure for institutions that require absolute record integrity. Whether for settlement, compliance, or supply chain, we deliver networks that hold up under the highest scrutiny.
Capabilities.cloud_desc: We design and operate secure, compliant cloud environments for organizations that cannot tolerate downtime or compromise. Your team focuses on building; we handle the architecture, governance, and reliability.

ServiceDetails.header_sub: From custom software to AI systems, blockchain networks, and cloud infrastructure — we cover the full technology stack your enterprise needs.
ServiceDetails.software_desc: We build reliable, well-crafted software tailored to your business — so your team can move fast and grow with confidence.
ServiceDetails.ai_desc: We design and deploy AI systems that help your organization make smarter, faster decisions backed by data you can trust.
ServiceDetails.blockchain_desc: We build transparent, tamper-proof ledger infrastructure that gives institutions the auditability and record integrity they need.
ServiceDetails.infra_desc: We design and manage secure, compliant cloud environments built to scale — so your team can deploy with confidence, every time.

SectorDetails.header_sub: We build the technological foundations that power the world's most important industries. Our work is defined by partnership, precision, and a commitment to long-term outcomes.
SectorDetails.finance_desc: We partner with banks and payment providers to build the core infrastructure that keeps financial services running reliably. From digital payment systems to compliance-ready platforms, we deliver foundations your institution can depend on.
SectorDetails.education_desc: We help academic institutions and learning platforms modernize the way education is delivered and managed. Our work transforms legacy systems into connected, digital-first environments that serve both educators and students.
SectorDetails.energy_desc: We give energy companies and logistics operators the operational visibility they need to move with confidence. Our platforms connect the dots across complex supply chains, reducing inefficiency and improving decision-making at every stage.
SectorDetails.wholesale_desc: We optimize distribution networks for wholesale operators managing commerce at scale. Our systems bring clarity to high-volume operations — from inventory management to order fulfillment — so your business runs smoothly as it grows.
SectorDetails.healthcare_desc: We build secure, well-structured data systems for healthcare providers and clinical institutions. Our work ensures that sensitive patient data is managed with care, and that technology supports — rather than disrupts — the delivery of quality care.
SectorDetails.mining_desc: We equip mining and natural resource companies with robust operational systems that improve site management, safety compliance, and resource tracking. Our technology connects field operations with back-office teams — reducing downtime and increasing extraction efficiency.
SectorDetails.manufacturing_desc: We help manufacturers modernize production workflows through integrated systems that connect the factory floor to the supply chain. From inventory automation to quality management, our platforms reduce operational friction and enable smarter manufacturing at scale.
SectorDetails.cta_title: Ready to Discuss Your Technical Roadmap?
SectorDetails.cta_sub: We welcome conversations with industry leaders who are thinking carefully about their technology future. Let us know what you are building — we would be glad to explore how we can help.

ServiceApproach.label: Our Method
ServiceApproach.body: Build the systems that regulated industries and critical enterprises depend on — through engineering precision, deep domain context, and an unwavering commitment to outcomes that endure long after deployment.
ServiceApproach.story_intro: In financial services, a delayed transaction is a questioned transaction. We asked: what if compliance checking could run faster than the transaction itself?
ServiceApproach.story_p1: Working alongside a regional bank managing high-frequency payment flows across six markets, we built a real-time compliance engine that screens every transaction against live regulatory rule sets in under 50 milliseconds. The system ingests jurisdiction-specific data, applies institution-defined thresholds, and flags anomalies before funds clear — not after.
ServiceApproach.story_p2: This was not a matter of tuning an existing vendor tool. We designed the architecture from scratch around a single constraint: compliance at the speed of commerce. Every decision — from data pipeline design to alert triage logic — was made with that constraint as the governing principle.
ServiceApproach.story_p3: Today, the platform processes over three million transactions daily with no production downtime since launch. More importantly, it gave the bank's compliance team a system they could explain to regulators, operate with confidence, and extend as requirements evolve. That is what we mean when we say we build to last.

About.intro_title: A Technology Partner You Can Rely On.
About.intro_text: ScaleJade is a technology firm helping enterprises build the digital foundation for their future — across software, AI, blockchain, and cloud.
About.who_we_are_text: We are a team of software engineers, data scientists, blockchain developers, and cloud architects with deep experience in regulated and high-growth industries. We work closely with our clients — not just as vendors, but as long-term technology partners committed to your success.
About.mission_text: To help enterprises and institutions build technology they can depend on — reliable, secure, and ready to grow with their business.
About.value_1_desc: We build systems designed to hold up under real-world demands — whether you're serving hundreds or millions of users.
About.value_2_desc: Security isn't an afterthought — it's built into every layer of what we deliver, from architecture to deployment.
About.value_3_desc: We understand the regulatory environments our clients operate in, and we design our systems to meet them.
About.value_4_desc: Every solution we build is designed with growth in mind, so your technology evolves as your organization does.

Portfolio.title: Projects We're Proud Of.
Portfolio.subtitle: A selection of work we've done for clients across industries — from financial platforms to AI-powered systems and blockchain networks.

Demo.title: Ready to Start a Conversation?
Demo.subtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll find a time to connect. No pressure — just a straightforward discussion about what we can build together.
Demo.cal_desc: Pick a time that suits you to connect with one of our senior engineers.
